---
title: "Are dark-backed birds darker overall?"
author: "Ore, MJ."
date: "2025-03-10"
output: rmarkdown::github_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```


```{r prep data - geographic variation in color, echo = FALSE}

library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(viridis)

here::i_am("R_scripts/Color_correlations.Rmd")


avg_img <- read.csv(here("data/BTBW_whole_specimen_Image_Analysis_measurements_allpop_avgimg_wide.csv"))

## select only brightness for ASY males
asy <- avg_img %>% 
  filter(Age == "ASY")

```
How do luminance and shortwavelength correlate
```{r sw vs lum, echo =F }

lumsw <- asy %>% 
  dplyr::select(starts_with("lumMean"), starts_with("swMean"))

# Extract unique letters from column names
letters <- gsub(".*_", "", names(lumsw)[grepl("lumMean_", names(lumsw))])

# Calculate correlations for matching columns
correlations <- sapply(letters, function(letter) {
  lum_col <- paste0("lumMean_", letter)
  sw_col <- paste0("swMean_", letter)
  cor(lumsw[[lum_col]], lumsw[[sw_col]], use = "complete.obs")
})

# Convert to a data frame
correlation_df <- data.frame(
  Letter = letters,
  Correlation = correlations
)


```

#crown

```{r crown, echo = F}
library(lmerTest)
library(MuMIn)
library(sjPlot)

# check for normality
hist(asy$dblMean_d)
hist(asy$dblMean_c)

z <- lmerTest::lmer(dblMean_c ~ dblMean_d + (1|Year) + (1|prepartor), data = asy, na.action = na.exclude) 
summary(z)

r.squaredGLMM(z)
tab_model(z)

ggplot(asy)+
  geom_point(aes(x = dblMean_d, y = dblMean_c, col = lat))+
  scale_color_viridis_c(direction = -1)+
  geom_smooth(aes(x = dblMean_d, y = dblMean_c), method = "lm", col = "black")+
  labs(x = "Dorsum Brightness", y = "Crown Brightness")+
  ylim(0.035, 0.1)+
  theme_classic()

```

#wingspot

```{r wingspot}

library(lmerTest)
library(MuMIn)
library(sjPlot)

# check for normality
hist(asy$dblMean_d)
hist(asy$dblMean_w)

z <- lmerTest::lmer(dblMean_w ~ dblMean_d + (1|Year) + (1|prepartor), data = asy, na.action = na.exclude) 
summary(z)

r.squaredGLMM(z)
tab_model(z)

ggplot(asy)+
  geom_point(aes(x = dblMean_d, y = dblMean_w, col = lat))+
  scale_color_viridis_c(direction = -1)+
  geom_smooth(aes(x = dblMean_d, y = dblMean_w), method = "lm", col = "black")+
  labs(x = "Dorsum Brightness", y = "Wingspot Brightness")+
  theme_classic()



z <- lmerTest::lmer(dblMean_w ~ area_mm2_c + (1|Year) + (1|prepartor), data = asy, na.action = na.exclude) 
summary(z)

r.squaredGLMM(z)
tab_model(z)

ggplot(asy)+
  geom_point(aes(x = dblMean_d, y = area_mm2_c, col = lat))+
  scale_color_viridis_c(direction = -1)+
  geom_smooth(aes(x = dblMean_d, y = area_mm2_c), method = "lm", col = "black")+
  labs(x = "Dorsum Brightness", y = "Wingspot area (mm2)")+
  theme_classic()

```

#throat

```{r throat}

library(lmerTest)
library(MuMIn)
library(sjPlot)

# check for normality
hist(asy$dblMean_d)
hist(asy$dblMean_t)

z <- lmerTest::lmer(dblMean_t ~ dblMean_d + (1|Year) + (1|prepartor), data = asy, na.action = na.exclude) 
summary(z)

r.squaredGLMM(z)
tab_model(z)

ggplot(asy)+
  geom_point(aes(x = dblMean_d, y = dblMean_t, col = lat))+
  scale_color_viridis_c(direction = -1)+
  geom_smooth(aes(x = dblMean_d, y = dblMean_t), method = "lm", col = "black")+
  labs(x = "Dorsum Brightness", y = "Throat Brightness")+
  theme_classic()

```

#marginal covert

```{r coverts}

library(lmerTest)
library(MuMIn)
library(sjPlot)

# check for normality
hist(asy$dblMean_d)
hist(asy$dblMean_o)

z <- lmerTest::lmer(dblMean_o ~ dblMean_d + (1|Year) + (1|prepartor), data = asy, na.action = na.exclude) 
summary(z)

r.squaredGLMM(z)
tab_model(z)

ggplot(asy)+
  geom_point(aes(x = dblMean_d, y = dblMean_o, col = lat))+
  scale_color_viridis_c(direction = -1)+
  geom_smooth(aes(x = dblMean_d, y = dblMean_o), method = "lm", col = "black")+
  labs(x = "Dorsum Brightness", y = "Covert Brightness")+
  theme_classic()

```

#belly

```{r belly}

library(lmerTest)
library(MuMIn)
library(sjPlot)

# check for normality
hist(asy$dblMean_d)
hist(asy$dblMean_b)

z <- lmerTest::lmer(dblMean_b ~ dblMean_d + (1|Year) + (1|prepartor), data = asy, na.action = na.exclude) 
summary(z)

r.squaredGLMM(z)
tab_model(z)

ggplot(asy)+
  geom_point(aes(x = dblMean_d, y = dblMean_b, col = lat))+
  scale_color_viridis_c(direction = -1)+
  geom_smooth(aes(x = dblMean_d, y = dblMean_b), method = "lm", col = "black")+
  labs(x = "Dorsum Brightness", y = "Belly Brightness")+
  ylim(0.3,0.6)+
  theme_classic()

```
